summary: Iteration 5 retest of single failing acceptance criterion: Notes.jsx submit() now captures API response and renders SaveReceipt with all sub-testids. Verified on both desktop (1920) and mobile (390) viewports. PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: Notes.jsx submit() correctly destructures `data` from api.post('/notes', form) and calls setLastSaved(data) — fix verified.
SaveReceipt receives `record={lastSaved}` and renders sub-testids: note-save-receipt-timestamp (font-mono UK), note-save-receipt-author, note-save-receipt-ref (starts with #).
Mobile 390px: receipt rendered above form (y=197 vs y=349), no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=clientWidth=390).
seed_data_creation: Created 2 notes during testing: 'Receipt retest body' (desktop) and 'Receipt retest body mobile' (mobile)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Acceptance criterion fully verified. Desktop: timestamp='Mon, 04 May 2026, 13:21:43', author='Alex Staff', ref='#8ABCC99E', font-mono on timestamp confirmed. Mobile 390: no overflow, receipt above form. Backend was 28/28 in iter 4, not retested per request. Single test only run; all other iter-4 frontend behaviours not retested per request.
